title: Martine Barrat, a photographer without fear or limits
subhed: At 93, the artist has lost none of her vitality or curiosity. She lives at the legendary Hotel Chelsea in New York, where she remains one of the last year-round artist residents. Today, her work is the subject of a retrospective at the Rencontres d'Arles photography festival.
